scripts.export-android: mkdir -p android/output BundleOutput/android && react-native bundle --platform android --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output android/output/index.android.bundle --assets-dest android/output --sourcemap-output android/sourcemap.js && cd android && find output -type f | zip ../BundleOutput/android/index.android.bundle.zip -@ && zip ../BundleOutput/android/sourcemap.zip sourcemap.js && cd .. && rm -rf android/output && rm -rf android/sourcemap.js
scripts.export-ios: mkdir -p ios/output BundleOutput/ios && react-native bundle --platform ios --dev false --entry-file index.js --bundle-output ios/output/main.jsbundle --assets-dest ios/output --sourcemap-output ios/sourcemap.js && cd ios && find output -type f | zip ../BundleOutput/ios/main.jsbundle.zip -@ && zip ../BundleOutput/ios/sourcemap.zip sourcemap.js && cd .. && rm -rf ios/output && rm -rf ios/sourcemap.js
scripts.export-byte-android: mkdir -p dist/android BundleOutput/android && npx expo export:embed --platform android --minify=true --entry-file index.tsx --bundle-output dist/android/index.android.bundle --dev false  --assets-dest dist/android && ./node_modules/react-native/sdks/hermesc/linux64-bin/hermesc -emit-binary -out dist/android/index.android.hbc.bundle dist/android/index.android.bundle -output-source-map -w && rm -f dist/android/index.android.bundle dist/android/index.android.hbc.bundle.map && cd dist && find android -type f | zip ../BundleOutput/android/hermes.hbc.zip -@ && cd .. && rm -rf dist/android
scripts.export-byte-ios: mkdir -p dist/ios BundleOutput/ios && npx expo export:embed --platform ios --minify=true --entry-file index.tsx --bundle-output dist/ios/main.jsbundle --dev false --assets-dest dist/ios && ./node_modules/react-native/sdks/hermesc/linux64-bin/hermesc -emit-binary -out dist/ios/main.ios.hbc.jsbundle dist/ios/main.jsbundle -output-source-map -w && rm -f dist/ios/main.jsbundle dist/ios/main.ios.hbc.jsbundle.map && cd dist && find ios -type f | zip ../BundleOutput/ios/hermes.hbc.zip -@ && cd .. && rm -rf dist/ios
